name: WritersProof for Canvas
tagline: Positive proof of student authorship for every assignment submission
description: WritersProof for Canvas provides cryptographic authorship attestation for student work submitted through Instructure Canvas. Deployed as an LTI 1.3 tool, WritersProof captures tamper-evident behavioral evidence while students write, without storing actual content — only SHA-256 hashes. Instructors see attestation status alongside submissions in SpeedGrader, giving them verifiable proof of human authorship rather than probabilistic AI detection guesses. Institutions gain a privacy-preserving, FERPA-compliant layer of academic integrity that complements existing honor code policies.
features: LTI 1.3 Advantage integration with Canvas Assignment and SpeedGrader
Attestation status column in SpeedGrader for at-a-glance review
Student-visible evidence capture indicator during assignment composition
Course-level and institution-level attestation analytics dashboards
Evidence session timeline with writing cadence and revision depth metrics
Canvas Rich Content Editor support for essay and long-form assignments
FERPA-compliant architecture with zero content storage, only cryptographic hashes

requirements.integration_type: LTI 1.3 Advantage (Deep Linking + Assignment and Grade Services)
requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
